PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?numRaces WHERE {
  ?season wdt:P1346 wd:Q9671 .
  ?season wdt:P1350 ?numRaces .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?numRaces)
LIMIT 1
